title: Maxema - Pixel - Personalized and promotional pens. Promotional writing instruments and custom printed pens.
description: Pixel Square-cut lines that reflect a search for a perfect meld of clean-cut, essential shape and sober elegance. Particular attention has been dedicated to practicality with plenty of space for customisation which can be exploited very simply for screen or pad printing.

headings.text: Design with basic features: a feisty pen for dynamic brands
The ventilated push-button is compliant with EU laws for small components

Particular attention has been dedicated to practicality with plenty of space for customisation which can be exploited very simply for screen or pad printing. GOM C CR Show details add to favorites ABS plastic, solid colours, rubber finish barrel, chromed push-button PX40 - GOM 30 CR Show details add to favorites ABS plastic, transparent colours, rubber finish barrel, chromed push-button 3/4 Technical information Print areas and tech specs Features ● retractable ● ventilated push-button ● made of non-toxic, highly resistant ABS plastic ● X-20 refill, blue and black ink ● the barrel is available in glossy, matt or rubberised finish ● rubberised barrel versions (GOM) are only printable on the clip Print areas 1 screen printing 50 x 25 mm * 2 pad printing 30 x 8 mm 3 pad printing 60 x 9 mm * * Not available for the following versions: - PX40 - GOM C CR - PX40 - GOM 30 CR 4/4 Customisations The brands mentioned in this catalogue are the exclusive property of the respective owners.
